meaning_ne: dherai manche lai khana khuwaune karyakram
karyakram ko lagi dherai khana ko order
bhoj ya party ma khana puryaune sewa
sewa bata khushi bhayera dine paisa

meaning_en: mandatory service fee added to bill

meaning_ne: masu ra anda nabha ko khana
hotel ma base ra khana khane
dherai item ekai sath paune offer
saaman ra kaam ko anumanit mulya
nirmaan ko lagi napi gareko lambai chaudai
dhalai ma prayog hune falam ko danda
nirmaan ma prayog hune siment powder
bathroom ma hune nal ra fitting haru
kaam suru garnu agadi diyeko paisa
doctor le lekheko aushadhi ko parcha

meaning_en: date after which medicine is invalid

meaning_ne: brand nam nabha ko saman aushadhi
company ko brand nam bha ko aushadhi
parcha bina na dine aushadhi ko suchi
sawari ya saaman dhunwani garda lagne paisa

meaning_en: single journey from point A to B
meaning_ne: ek sthan bata arko sthan ko yatra
mukhye sadak prayog gare baphat ko sulka
sawari chalau ko lagi sarkari anumati patra
shiksha sewa ko lagi line paisa
padhai ko lagi diyeko arthik sahayog
bidhyarthi le lagaune ekai prakar ko poshak
pustak padhne ra sangraha garne sthal
school bus sewa ko lagi line paisa
khet ma umejeko anna ya tarkari
bali ko lagi prayog hune urbarak
ropne ko lagi chahine dhan ya tarkari ko biu
khet ma jotaune ya banso hataune kaam
bali bhae pachi niskiye ko utpadan
khana ma swad lai prayog hune masala
pasal surakchhya ko li gudane dhoka
ekai patak pathaye ko saaman ko jatha
mahsik roop ma agrim bhuktani gareko bus card
plastic le dhakiye ko green house
dudh sangraha ra bikri garne byawasaya
agadi nai table sure garna booking garne
maida ma masu ya tarkari bharera banaeko parikar
masala halera pakako masu ra bhat ko parikar
bijuli tar jodne kaam garne byakti
pani pipe jodne kaam garne byakti
gadi ko pahiye ma hune rabar
khetipati ko lagi liye ko rin
mato ma plastic sheet ojhyane kriya
truck saaman lai pani bata bachau cover
